zh.lifeSummary: 當Martha Emily Castell於1512年出生在英國坎布利其爾哈特利 聖 喬治時，她的父親Thomas Castell32歲，母親Amnelia Barnett29歲。她於1526年與Robert Adhelm Lambe of Leeds在英國坎布利其爾易亞斯特 哈特利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1603年在英國越可爾利德斯享年91歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Martha Emily Castell于1512年出生在英国坎布利其爾哈特利 聖 喬治时，她的父亲Thomas Castell32岁，母亲Amnelia Barnett29岁。她于1526年与Robert Adhelm Lambe of Leeds在英国坎布利其爾易亞斯特 哈特利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1603年在英国越可爾利德斯享年91岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Castell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Roberto, Amarilys, Carlos, Eduardo, Estevan, Francisco, Guadalupe, Humberto, Jorge, Manuel, Mateo, Pablo.
English and Scottish: variant of   Castle  .

Manx: shortened form of Gaelic Mac Asgaill ‘son of Ásketill’, an Old Norse personal name composed of the elements áss ‘god’ + ketill ‘sacrificial cauldron, helmet’. The Manx surname is cognate with Scottish Gaelic McAskill .

variants.name: Castille
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcee, Antoine, Armand, Maudry, Michel, Monique, Normand, Remy, Renella.
Americanized form of Catalan   Castell  , under the French influence in LA.
French: habitational name from the French name for Castile in Spain (see   Castilla  ).

variants.name: Castle
meanings: English: topographic name from Anglo-Norman French, Middle English castel ‘castle, fortified building or set of buildings’, especially the residence of a feudal lord (from Late Latin castellum, a diminutive of castrum ‘fort, Roman walled city’). The name would also have denoted a servant who lived and worked at such a place, or someone who had an obligation to provide services or rent to a castle.

nameMeanings.name: Martha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, of Aramaic rather than Hebrew origin, meaning ‘lady’. It was borne by the sister of Lazarus and Mary of Bethany (John 11:1). According to Luke 10:38, when Jesus visited the house of Mary and Martha, Mary sat at his feet, listening to him, while Martha ‘was cumbered about much serving’, so that she complained to Jesus, ‘Lord, dost thou not care that my sister hath left me to serve alone?’ For this reason, the name Martha has always been associated with hard domestic work, as opposed to the contemplative life.

nameMeanings.name: Emily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a medieval form of the Latin name Aemilia, the feminine version of the old Roman family name Aemilius (probably from aemulus ‘rival’). It was not common in the Middle Ages, but was revived in the 19th century and is extremely popular throughout the English-speaking world today. Its best-known 19th‐century bearer was probably the novelist and poet Emily Brontë ( 1818–48 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Martha Emily Castell was born in 1512, in Hatley St George, Cambridgeshire, England, her father, Thomas Castell, was 32 and her mother, Amnelia Barnett, was 29. She married Robert Adhelm Lambe of Leeds in 1526, in East Hatley, Cambridgeshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1603, in Leeds, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 91, and was buried in London, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Martha Emily Castell est née en 1512, à Hatley St George, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Castell, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Amnelia Barnett, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Adhelm Lambe of Leeds en 1526, à East Hatley, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1603, à Leeds, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 91 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Martha Emily Castell 1512 in Hatley St George, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Castell 32 und ihre Mutter Amnelia Barnett 29. Sie hat 1526 in East Hatley, Cambridgeshire, England Robert Adhelm Lambe of Leeds geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1603 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Leeds, Yorkshire, England und wurde in London, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Martha Emily Castell è nata il nel 1512 nel Hatley St George, Cambridgeshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Castell, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Amnelia Barnett, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Robert Adhelm Lambe of Leeds nel 1526, nel East Hatley, Cambridgeshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1603, nel Leeds, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 91 anni, e fu sepolta a London, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Martha Emily Castellが1512年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアハトリー スト ジョーッジで生まれた時，父Thomas Castellは32歳，母Amnelia Barnettは29歳であった。1526年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアエアスト ハトリーでRobert Adhelm Lambe of Leedsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1603年にイギリスヨークシュアイアリーズで91歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Martha Emily Castell(이)가 1512년 영국 캄브리지실르 하틀리 스트 조지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Castell(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Amnelia Barnett(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1526년 영국 캄브리지실르 이스트 하틀리에서 Robert Adhelm Lambe of Leeds(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1603년 영국 요르크실르 리드즈에서 91세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Martha Emily Castell nasceu em 1512, em Hatley St George, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Castell, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Amnelia Barnett, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Adhelm Lambe of Leeds em 1526, em East Hatley, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1603, em Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 91 anos, e foi sepultada em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Martha Emily Castell родилась в 1512 г. в местности хатли ст джеордж, камбриджешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Castell было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Amnelia Barnett, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Adhelm Lambe of Leeds в 1526 г. в местности эаст хатли, камбриджешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1603 г. в местности лидс, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 91 год и была похоронена в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Martha Emily Castell nació en 1512, en Hatley St George, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Castell, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Amnelia Barnett, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Robert Adhelm Lambe of Leeds en 1526, en East Hatley, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1603, en Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 91 años, y fue sepultada en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
